rationale: The proposed change concerns the property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §39.027 governs student assessment exemptions and has no relation to property tax or homestead valuation.
_note: No conflict: the rule cited (Educ. Code §39.027) addresses student assessment exemptions and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b).
